message:
Enhance fcp-cli new scaffold with auto-computed interface hash

Manifest generation improvements:
- Auto-compute interface_hash from declared operations using ConnectorManifest
- Replace placeholder hash after generation via finalize_manifest_toml()
- Parse and validate final manifest to catch errors early
- Change state model from singleton_writer to stateless (simpler default)
- Remove migration_hint for stateless connectors

Dependency updates:
- Remove fcp-core direct dependency (use fcp-sdk instead)
- Remove async-trait (not needed with newer Rust)
- Add sha2 and hex for hash computation

Archetype mapping:
- Map CLI archetypes to FCP2 categories: operational, streaming,
  bidirectional, storage
- request_response/polling/cli/browser → operational
- streaming/webhook → streaming
- bidirectional/queue → bidirectional
- file/database → storage

Operation defaults:
- Change idempotency from read_only to idempotent
- Update required capabilities: network.egress → network.outbound
- Add comprehensive network_constraints defaults with deny flags

File generation:
- Add src/lib.rs to generated files
- Return Result from generate_files() to handle manifest errors

This ensures scaffolded connectors have valid, verifiable interface hashes
from the start.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
